name: KrillApp
title: Krill App
description: Root type for all Krill node types. This is the base sealed class from which all node types are derived. It has no runtime behavior of its own.
shortDescription: Root type for all Krill node types.
llmPurpose: Root sealed class for the KrillApp type hierarchy. All node types are subtypes of KrillApp.
llmBehavior: defines the root of the node type hierarchy
llmCreationHints: This is the root type and is not directly instantiated. Use specific subtypes (Server, Client, DataPoint, Trigger, Executor, etc.) instead.

llmConnectionHints.role: root of the node type hierarchy
